title: Lead Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Oriental Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oriental Insurance:
Oriental Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance!
